mapper.sql: p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.category AS category, r.region_id AS regionId, r.region_name AS regionName, r.region_full_name AS regionFullName, p.address AS address, p.latitude AS latitude, p.longitude AS longitude, p.description AS description, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.thumbnail_url, ''), NULLIF(p.image_url, ''), '/images/default-place.svg') AS displayImageUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.thumbnail_url, ''), NULLIF(p.image_url, ''), '/images/default-place.svg') AS thumbnailImageUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.image_url, ''), NULLIF(p.thumbnail_url, ''), '/images/default-place.svg') AS detailImageUrl, COALESCE(ra.average_rating, 0) AS averageRating, COALESCE(ra.review_count, 0) AS reviewCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT place_id, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS average_rating, COUNT(*) AS review_count, ( (COUNT(*) / (COUNT(*) + 5.0)) * AVG(rating) + (5.0 / (COUNT(*) + 5.0)) * 3.0 ) AS recommendation_score FROM PLACE_REVIEW WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY place_id ) ra ON ra.place_id = p.place_id

sql.if:
(
(
(CASE WHEN p.place_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 20 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN r.region_full_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 8 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN r.region_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 8 ELSE 0 END) + (CASE WHEN p.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{term}, '%') THEN 4 ELSE 0 END)
+ (CASE WHEN p.category = #{token.category} THEN 10 ELSE 0 END)
+ (CASE WHEN p.cat3 = #{token.cat3} THEN 8 ELSE 0 END)
+ (CASE WHEN p.lcls_systm2 = #{token.lclsSystm2} THEN 8 ELSE 0 END)
)
) DESC,

mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM PLACE p JOIN REGION r ON p.region_id = r.region_id
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN COALESCE(ra.review_count, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, COALESCE(ra.recommendation_score, 0) DESC, COALESCE(ra.review_count, 0) DESC,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(ra.review_count, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, COALESCE(ra.review_count, 0) DESC, COALESCE(ra.average_rating, 0) DESC,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(ra.review_count, 0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, COALESCE(ra.average_rating, 0) DESC, COALESCE(ra.review_count, 0) DESC,
p.place_id ASC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE p JOIN REGION r ON p.region_id = r.region_id
SELECT place_id AS placeId, latitude AS latitude, longitude AS longitude FROM PLACE WHERE place_id = #{placeId}

SELECT category AS value, CASE WHEN category = '레포츠' THEN '레저스포츠' ELSE category END AS label, COUNT(*) AS count FROM PLACE WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC, label ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT parent.region_id AS regionId, parent.region_name AS regionName, parent.region_full_name AS regionFullName, parent.region_level AS regionLevel, parent.parent_region_id AS parentRegionId, COUNT(p.place_id) AS placeCount FROM REGION child JOIN REGION parent ON child.parent_region_id = parent.region_id JOIN PLACE p ON p.region_id = child.region_id GROUP BY parent.region_id, parent.region_name, parent.region_full_name, parent.region_level, parent.parent_region_id
UNION ALL
SELECT r.region_id AS regionId, r.region_name AS regionName, r.region_full_name AS regionFullName, r.region_level AS regionLevel, r.parent_region_id AS parentRegionId, COUNT(p.place_id) AS placeCount FROM REGION r JOIN PLACE p ON p.region_id = r.region_id GROUP BY r.region_id, r.region_name, r.region_full_name, r.region_level, r.parent_region_id ) region_filters ORDER BY regionLevel ASC, regionFullName ASC

SELECT f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.facility_type AS facilityType, f.category_group_code AS categoryGroupCode, f.category_name AS categoryName, f.facility_name AS facilityName, f.phone AS phone, f.address AS address, f.road_address AS roadAddress, f.latitude AS latitude, f.longitude AS longitude, f.place_url AS placeUrl, pnf.distance_m AS distanceM FROM PLACE_NEARBY_FACILITY pnf JOIN FACILITY f ON pnf.facility_id = f.facility_id WHERE pnf.place_id = #{placeId} AND pnf.facility_type = #{facilityType} AND pnf.search_radius_m = #{searchRadiusM} ORDER BY CASE WHEN pnf.distance_m IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, pnf.distance_m ASC, f.facility_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FACILITY ( source_provider, external_id, facility_type, category_group_code, category_name, facility_name, phone, address, road_address, latitude, longitude, place_url ) VALUES ( 'KAKAO', #{facility.externalId}, #{facility.facilityType}, #{facility.facilityType.categoryGroupCode}, #{facility.categoryName}, #{facility.facilityName}, #{facility.phone}, #{facility.address}, #{facility.roadAddress}, #{facility.latitude}, #{facility.longitude}, #{facility.placeUrl} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE facility_type = VALUES(facility_type), category_group_code = VALUES(category_group_code), category_name = VALUES(category_name), facility_name = VALUES(facility_name), phone = VALUES(phone), address = VALUES(address), road_address = VALUES(road_address), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), place_url = VALUES(place_url), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO PLACE_NEARBY_FACILITY ( place_id, facility_id, facility_type, distance_m, search_radius_m ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{facilityId}, #{facilityType}, #{distanceM}, #{searchRadiusM} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE facility_type = VALUES(facility_type), distance_m = VALUES(distance_m), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO PLACE_NEARBY_FACILITY_CACHE ( place_id, facility_type, search_radius_m, result_count, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{facilityType}, #{searchRadiusM}, #{resultCount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE result_count = VALUES(result_count), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
